changes.description: Added get_reverse_dependency_files() to find unchanged files with edges into changed files, and remove_edges_from_file() to delete outgoing edges before rebuilding.

Updated index() to collect reverse deps before node removal, then re-parse affected unchanged files and re-run edge phases (imports, calls, heritage, types, exports) to restore cross-file edges. Added _hybrid_search = None reset at start of index() to invalidate stale search cache.
